roa.docketEntryComment: Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance
Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance

/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN FOR 03-23-21 FAILURE TO APPEAR AT PRELIMINARY HEARING AND SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/INTC/BWDNC/CTORD: SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT DISCHARGED/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALLBE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDERIN FILE,/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/X: CASE IS IN WAIVER BY CONDUCT STATUS,/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:WAIVER BY CONDUCT STATUS/X:DEFENDANT HAS HAD NO CONTACT WITH ACM SINCE FEBRUARY/CONTD PROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDEREDAND   STAYED TO 03-23-21/X: BAIL SET AT $20,000/CONTD: BW STAY FTA PRELIMON 03-18-21 $20K/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 03-24-21 (30TH)/X:THE 60TH LAST DAY IS 04-09-21/987,2/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'SDEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLYWITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/MO PC 1385: INTEREST OF JUSTICE/CTORD: ACM TERMINATED/
